title: On divergence form SPDEs with VMO coefficients
comment:
26 pages in the original file, 27 pages in the new version, numerous
  errors corrected
summary:
We present several results on solvability in Sobolev spaces $W^{1}_{p}$ of
SPDEs in divergence form in the whole space.

title: Inductive Analysis on Singular Minimal Hypersurfaces
comment:
This paper was submitted for publication as a part of a largely
  extended version of "Singular Minimal Hypersurfaces and Positive Scalar
  Curvature" math.DG/0609338 several months ago. We now put it on the web
  separately, since it will be instructive for the study of smoothing of
  singular minimal hypersurfaces via introduction of obstacles
summary:
The present paper describes a way to relate Martin boundaries on spaces of
varying topology. This enables us to approach some detailed inductive analysis
of the eigenfunctions of conformal Laplacians on minimal hypersurfaces near
their singularities. This can directly be used resp. translated to understand
the way how such minimal hypersurfaces inherit positive scalar curvature from
their ambience resp. how to smooth singular minimal hypersurfaces to regular
hypersurfaces with positive mean curvature.
